generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "A permanent magnet synchronous motor generating torque (τ_M) from input current (I_M) in the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearTransmissionSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "A multi-stage gearbox system (gearwheel → cycloidal gearbox) reducing torque (τ_G → τ_out) while transmitting rotational motion (ω), constrained by safety cell limiting working range to [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed of 75°/s"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Low gear ratio cycloidal gearbox component within the gear transmission system for precise motion control"
    base:isContainedIn GearTransmissionSystem
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Real-time measurement of input current (I_M) to infer torque via motor constants"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring angular position to reduce positional uncertainty"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind gearbox measuring output position for backlash reduction"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionData
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring torque (τ_G) in the gear transmission system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueData
]

instance AngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring angular velocity (ω) of the gear transmission system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocitySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance StructuralSysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram describing the first axis as composition of PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor and GearTransmissionSystem components"
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model simulating Coulomb-Viscous friction dynamics in the gear transmission system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model simulating Stribeck friction behavior for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink model implementing LuGre friction dynamics for comprehensive motion analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance MeasuredMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data from motor encoder measuring angular position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnifiedVisualizationDashboard
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data from torque sensor measuring gear transmission torque"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnifiedVisualizationDashboard
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data from angular velocity sensor measuring system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnifiedVisualizationDashboard
]

instance SimulatedCoulombViscousOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output data from Coulomb-Viscous friction model for comparison with measured values"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisDashboard
]

instance SimulatedStribeckOutput : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output data from Stribeck friction model for motion accuracy analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData StribeckFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlOptimizationService
]

instance FrictionLossComparisonData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Comparison between measured friction losses and simulated friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueData, SimulatedCoulombViscousOutput, SimulatedStribeckOutput
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming protocol for live sensor integration via MQTT broker"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataStreamService
]

instance MathWorksSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation environment for developing friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre) in MATLAB/Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelSimulationService
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for creating structural (BDD) and behavioral (IBD) models of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDefinitionService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Twin infrastructure enabling integration with industrial control systems (e.g., Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller)"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemIntegrationService
]

instance TraceabilityFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) for explicit linking of data points to engineering/simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentification : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction (static, kinetic, viscous) using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) approaches"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysisInsight, ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance ModelDrivenControl : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of friction models into model-based software engineering workflows for control optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction, ParameterTuningInsight
]

instance UnifiedVisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization platform showing live data streams, simulated vs. measured outputs, and friction analysis metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionSupportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static/kinetic/viscous friction losses in the gearbox system"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of friction models to improve motion accuracy during machining tasks"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance WearDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of wear or load variations via deviations between simulated and measured outputs"
]

instance ParameterTuningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of optimal friction model parameters for control system performance"
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters based on friction model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemDiagnosticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive diagnostics of gearbox health and motion system performance"
]

// C11: Environment
instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmissionSystem
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and dynamic**:
  - **Data Acquisition Rate**: Sensor data (I_M, angle, torque) is processed at **high frequency** (implied by live streaming via MQTT and continuous friction modeling).
  - **Model Update Frequency**: Friction models (white-box/black-box) are dynamically refined during operation to account for wear, load changes, or tooling variations.
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces are aligned with physical events (e.g., robot movements) to ensure **low-latency** interactions between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is **purpose-driven** and modular:
  - **Core Components**:
    - **Digital Shadow (DS)**: Passive real-time representation of the first axis (motor + gearbox) with friction models.
    - **Processing Layer**: Consumes sensor data and friction models to compute simulated outputs (e.g., ˆr_M, ˆr_G).
    - **Dashboard**: Visualizes live data (measured vs. simulated) for friction analysis.
  - **Integration with Physical System**: Linked to the **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D** controller via AAS for closed-loop control."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the **operational lifecycle** of the robot:
  - **As-Operated Phase**: Emphasizes **real-time friction modeling** during machining tasks to improve motion accuracy.
  - **Continuous Improvement**: Models are updated dynamically to reflect **wear, load variations, or tooling changes** during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: Comparison of simulated vs. measured outputs (e.g., ˆr_out vs. r_out) to validate friction models.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Use of **two encoders** (motor + gearbox) to reduce positional uncertainty and backlash.
  - **Model Traceability**: Explicit association of data points to models (engineering/simulation) via the **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: Real-time data streaming from sensors (I_M, angle, torque) to the digital shadow.
  - **SysML Models**: Structural and behavioral modeling via **Block Definition Diagrams (BDD)** and **Internal Block Diagrams (IBD)**.
  - **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D**: Integration with the CNC controller for closed-loop control and friction-aware motion."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **SysML**: For structural and behavioral modeling.
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: For traceability and data aggregation.
  - **MQTT**: For real-time data communication."
]
